title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SM-10G-D-20 - U Fiber, Single-Mode Module, 10G, 20-Pack
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP+
description: UF-SM-10G is singlemode 10G SFP+ module with 2 LC connectors. Wave length is 1310nm and it is suitable for distance up to 10km . Module is compatible with all Ubiquiti devices which contain SFP+ ports. Package contains 20 pieces
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP+ For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 10 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 Distance [km] 10 Transfer type 2-fiber Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC General Compatibility Universal
